special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Every character can perform a double jump

special_mechanics.name: Attack While Running
special_mechanics.description: Characters can perform attacks while running

special_mechanics.name: Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Several characters can change their appearance and fighting style by executing certain moves, usually throwing moves

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Fighting game with documented game mechanics but no specific numerical physics parameters available in sources. Sources confirm general movement capabilities (double jump, run, mid-air direction change) but lack precise velocity, acceleration, or gravity values.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Power Instinct SNES article)
